action.reasoning: Observation: success_rate=0.0 after 20k steps (random policy). Analysis: Minigrid tasks (esp. KeyCorridor/MultiRoom) need 100k-1M+ timesteps; FlatObs+MlpPolicy+SB3 PPO is valid but undertrained; DummyVecEnv+CPU slow. Decision: scale to 1M timesteps, switch to SubprocVecEnv(16) for speed, add torch.cuda device, add post-train eval (5 eps/env) for real metrics in jsonl, keep wrappers/PPO for incremental gains; will measure time via next eval.
